title: Full Dream Jobs Consultancy Website Build with All Sections and Images

requirements.summary: Update HeroSection with airport background image, headline, bullet points, and dual WhatsApp contact modal
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays the airport background image with blue overlay/tone
All four checkmark bullet points are visible
Apply Now button scrolls to the application form section
WhatsApp Us button shows both India and UAE numbers for selection
Both WhatsApp links open correct wa.me URLs with the respective numbers

file_operations.description: Update component to use the generated airport background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-airport.dim_1920x1080.png. Change headline to 'Empowering Careers Beyond Borders' and subheading to 'Premium Overseas Recruitment for Gulf Countries'. Replace existing bullet points with four checkmark items: 'Trusted & Verified Employers', 'Structured & Transparent Recruitment', 'Professional Visa & Documentation Support', 'End-to-End Deployment Assistance'. Update 'Apply Now' button to scroll to ApplicationSection. Replace single WhatsApp button with 'WhatsApp Us' button that opens a modal or dropdown showing India (+91 63635 54699) and UAE (+971 54 214 1042) numbers as selectable links opening wa.me URLs.

requirements.summary: Update AboutSection to display corporate meeting image and full company description
acceptanceCriteria: About section displays the corporate meeting image
Full company description text is rendered
Layout is clean and professional with blue & gold color scheme

file_operations.description: Add the corporate office meeting image at frontend/public/assets/generated/about-meeting.dim_800x600.png alongside the company description. Replace the current description with: 'Dream Jobs Consultancy is a professionally managed overseas recruitment firm specializing in Gulf manpower placement. We are committed to delivering reliable, ethical, and structured recruitment services aligned with international standards. Our recruitment team works closely with both candidates and employers to ensure the right talent is matched with the right opportunity. From screening to deployment, every step is handled with precision, transparency, and professionalism. We believe overseas employment is not just a job — it is a life-changing opportunity.' Ensure layout displays image and text side-by-side on desktop, stacked on mobile, using blue & gold brand colors.

requirements.summary: Update JobCategoriesSection with all 6 complete job sectors, full role lists, and category images
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 sectors are displayed with their complete role lists
Four category images are shown alongside relevant sectors
Footer note about Gulf countries is visible
Layout is responsive (accordion on mobile, grid on desktop)

file_operations.description: Replace existing categories with all 6 complete sectors: 1) Household & Domestic Staff (House Driver, Fresh House Driver, House Cook, Fresh House Cook, House Maid, House Boy, Nanny/Babysitter, Caregiver, Private Gardener), 2) Hospitality & Hotel Staff (Waiter/Waitress, Room Attendant, Housekeeping Staff, Cleaner, Kitchen Helper, Commis Chef, Restaurant Supervisor, Receptionist), 3) Security Services (Security Guard, CCTV Operator, Security Supervisor), 4) Drivers & Transport (Light Vehicle Driver, Heavy Vehicle Driver, Delivery Driver, Personal Driver, Company Driver), 5) Skilled & Technical Workers (Electrician, Plumber, AC Technician, Carpenter, Mason, Welder, Painter, Fabricator), 6) General & Semi-Skilled Workers (Factory Worker, Packing Helper, Warehouse Worker, General Labour). Add category images: frontend/public/assets/generated/category-waiter.dim_400x400.png for Hospitality, category-driver.dim_400x400.png for Drivers, category-security.dim_400x400.png for Security, category-worker.dim_400x400.png for Skilled Workers. Add footer note: 'We recruit for UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Kuwait & Bahrain.' Maintain accordion on mobile, grid on desktop.

requirements.summary: Update RecruitmentProcessSection with travel-themed image and complete 6-step process
acceptanceCriteria: Travel-themed image is displayed in the section
All 6 numbered steps are shown clearly
Closing note about smooth processing is present

file_operations.description: Add travel-themed image at frontend/public/assets/generated/process-travel.dim_800x500.png to the section. Update the process steps to exactly 6: 1) Application & Document Submission, 2) Screening & Shortlisting, 3) Direct Employer Interview, 4) Selection & Official Offer Letter, 5) Medical & Visa Processing, 6) Deployment & Travel Coordination. Add closing note below steps: 'We ensure smooth and secure processing until successful placement.' Maintain numbered card layout with professional blue & gold styling.

requirements.summary: Update VisionMissionSection with exact Vision and Mission text
acceptanceCriteria: Vision and Mission headings and full text are displayed
Section uses the blue & gold brand color scheme

file_operations.description: Replace Vision text with: 'To become a leading and trusted overseas recruitment partner, empowering individuals to build successful international careers while maintaining the highest standards of integrity and transparency.' Replace Mission text with: 'To connect skilled professionals with verified global employers through a structured, ethical, and supportive recruitment process that prioritizes candidate welfare and long-term success.' Maintain Core Values cards if they exist, or focus only on Vision and Mission. Ensure blue & gold brand color scheme is applied.

requirements.summary: Update WhyTrustUsSection with expertise content, 6 trust points, and tagline
acceptanceCriteria: Expertise content and all 6 trust points are displayed
Tagline is visible
Section uses consistent brand styling

file_operations.description: Add expertise content at section top: 'We provide manpower solutions for Household Staff (Drivers, Cooks, House Maids, House Boys), Hospitality Professionals (Waiters, Cleaners, Supervisors), Skilled & Semi-Skilled Workers, Security Personnel. Each candidate undergoes structured screening to maintain quality placement standards.' Update trust points to exactly these 6: Verified International Employers, Transparent & Ethical Processing, Professional Documentation Support, Fast Interview Coordination, Dedicated Candidate Assistance, Strong Employer Network Across Gulf. Add tagline at section bottom: 'Integrity and professionalism define our services.' Maintain grid layout with icons and blue & gold styling.

requirements.summary: Update ContactSection with customer support image and complete contact details
acceptanceCriteria: Customer support image is displayed
All contact details (both phone numbers and email) are correct and visible
Section heading 'Begin Your Overseas Journey Today' is rendered
WhatsApp CTA button is present and functional

file_operations.description: Add customer support image at frontend/public/assets/generated/contact-support.dim_600x400.png alongside contact details. Update section heading to 'Begin Your Overseas Journey Today'. Display company name 'Dream Jobs Consultancy' and tagline 'Licensed Overseas Recruitment & Placement Services'. Show India Office: +91 63635 54699, UAE Office: +971 54 214 1042, Email: ddremjob@gmail.com. Add prominent WhatsApp CTA button that shows both contact numbers (similar to HeroSection WhatsApp modal). Use blue & gold brand styling.

requirements.summary: Update ApplicationSection form with all required fields and validation
acceptanceCriteria: Form contains all listed fields
Job Category dropdown lists roles from all 6 sectors
Desired Country dropdown has all 6 Gulf countries
Form validation prevents empty required field submission
Success confirmation is shown after submission

file_operations.description: Update form fields to: Full Name (text, required), Phone Number (tel, required), Job Category (dropdown populated with all roles from the 6 sectors defined in REQ-3, required), Desired Country (dropdown with UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Oman, Kuwait, Bahrain, required), Years of Experience (number, required), Additional Info (textarea, optional). Add form validation that prevents submission if required fields are empty. Display success confirmation message after form submission. Maintain professional blue & gold styling consistent with site theme.

requirements.summary: Ensure consistent professional blue & gold color scheme and floating WhatsApp button across all sections
acceptanceCriteria: All sections consistently use blue & gold color palette
No mismatched colors or off-brand elements
Floating WhatsApp button is visible and functional on all scroll positions

file_operations.description: Review and ensure CSS custom properties define primary deep blue (navy) and accent gold/amber colors. Update any conflicting color tokens to maintain consistency. Verify that brand color variables are applied globally for headings, CTAs, borders, and gradient backgrounds.

Ensure Tailwind color palette includes deep blue (navy) as primary brand color and gold/amber as accent color. Update any theme extensions to maintain professional blue & gold scheme. Verify colors are accessible and work in both light/dark modes if applicable.

Update the floating WhatsApp button to use the dual-number modal approach (India: +91 63635 54699, UAE: +971 54 214 1042) instead of a single hardcoded number. Ensure button remains fixed-positioned and visible on all scroll positions. Apply blue & gold brand styling to the button and modal. Use wa.me links with proper country codes and no spaces.

Review component order and ensure WhatsAppFloat component is rendered so it appears on all pages. Verify all section components are using consistent blue & gold styling props if needed. Ensure no off-brand color overrides exist in the component tree.
